basics.name: Chidvilash Yeccharla
basics.label: MS Artificial Intelligence Student | AI/ML Engineer
basics.summary: First-year MS Artificial Intelligence student at Northeastern University, Silicon Valley. Focused on LLMs, RAG, NLP, and Computer Vision. Published researcher and hands-on AI/ML engineer actively seeking Summer 2026 internships.

publications.name: Emotion-Responsive AI System
publications.summary: Co-authored a peer-reviewed conference paper on an AI system that detects and adapts to user emotional states in real-time for more empathetic human-computer interaction.

projects.name: Ask My Docs – RAG Application
projects.summary: Production-grade RAG system with hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, and RAGAS evaluation (faithfulness, context recall, answer relevancy). 16-file Python project.

projects.name: Salary Optimization Advisor
projects.summary: Flask web app providing AI-powered salary negotiation guidance using the Groq API with dynamic prompt engineering based on role, experience, and location inputs.

projects.name: Intelligent Spell Corrector
projects.summary: DP-based spell correction system using edit distance (Levenshtein) algorithm with interactive Streamlit demo and step-by-step DP table visualizer. Built for CS 5800 Algorithms.
